subcodes.first_line: They have imprisoned Us in a fortress built of solid rock, and have made the clouds of vain imaginings a barrier betwixt Us and them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حبسونا فی حصن بنی من الصخره الصما و جعلوا سحاب الاوهام حاجزا بیننا و بین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @high station of the true believer, @firmness in the Covenant, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
